description: Derived cell over an engine state (§51.0.J / §6.6). const <label> = match @light { ... } reads the engine-auto-declared @light; a direct guarded write @light = Light.Green recomputes label to "GO".
rationale: §51.0.J/§6.6 a derived may read an engine's state cell; the value-form match recomputes on the guarded transition. Red -> Green flips label STOP -> GO.
